sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25108" key="dia/lampros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-λαμπρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n25108.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clean, white,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐσθῆτες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Demoph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Sim.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
